{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies and addresses two inconsistencies in the original draft, demonstrating a walk-through of the argument chain.",
    "R1.4": "The agent provides a detailed mapping against three prior works, identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the agent did not identify harmful patterns in the original).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies and addresses two inconsistencies in the original draft, demonstrating a walk-through of the argument chain.
rationale.R1.4: The agent provides a detailed mapping against three prior works, identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the agent did not identify harmful patterns in the original).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not traced.
